environment.serviceStrategy: use repo-local dev/test commands; ask if services are required

checks.command: node --check chromux.mjs && bash -n test.sh && node chromux.mjs help >/tmp/chromux-help.txt && grep -q "wait-for-selector" /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux eval " /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux scroll " /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux wait " /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux console " /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux network " /tmp/chromux-help.txt && ! grep -q "^  chromux scroll-until " /tmp/chromux-help.txt
checks.passCriteria: command exits 0, help exposes `wait-for-selector`, and hidden compatibility aliases are not listed as primary help entries

testModeContract.covers: syntax, shell syntax, help surface, package surface

contract.passCriteria: command exits 0, help exposes `wait-for-selector`, and hidden compatibility aliases are not listed as primary help entries

checks.command: CHROMUX_HOME="$(mktemp -d /tmp/chromux-selftest-XXXXXX)" node chromux.mjs app --self-test >/tmp/chromux-selftest.txt && grep -q "command metadata registry invariants" /tmp/chromux-selftest.txt
checks.passCriteria: command exits 0 and self-test visibly proves command metadata registry invariants, including no per-call inline tab-command `Set` in `runCli`

testModeContract.covers: command metadata invariants and status app self-test

contract.method: `CHROMUX_HOME="$(mktemp -d /tmp/chromux-selftest-XXXXXX)" node chromux.mjs app --self-test >/tmp/chromux-selftest.txt && grep -q "command metadata registry invariants" /tmp/chromux-selftest.txt`
contract.passCriteria: command exits 0 and self-test visibly proves command metadata registry invariants, including no per-call inline tab-command `Set` in `runCli`

checks.passCriteria: command exits 0 and package allowlist remains valid

contract.sideEffect: launches and kills local test Chrome profiles

checks.command: bash -lc 'node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js preflight --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship-preflight.json && node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js ship --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json --title "Refactor CLI command registry" >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship.json && gh pr diff prd/cli-command-registry-refactor --name-only >/tmp/chromux-pr-diff.txt && node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js status --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship-status.json'
checks.passCriteria: preflight stage plan contains only allowed implementation paths, PR URL exists, PR diff excludes unrelated local artifacts, and required GitHub CI checks pass; if CI cannot pass, final status must be `Blocked`, not `Done`

testModeContract.covers: post-receipt PR URL and required GitHub CI pass through `prd-ship`

contract.method: `bash -lc 'node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js preflight --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship-preflight.json && node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js ship --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json --title "Refactor CLI command registry" >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship.json && gh pr diff prd/cli-command-registry-refactor --name-only >/tmp/chromux-pr-diff.txt && node ~/.codex/skills/prd-ship/scripts/prd_ship.js status --state .hoyeon/implement/cli-command-registry-refactor/state.json >/tmp/chromux-prd-ship-status.json'`
contract.passCriteria: preflight stage plan contains only allowed implementation paths, PR URL exists, PR diff excludes unrelated local artifacts, and required GitHub CI checks pass; if CI cannot pass, final status must be `Blocked`, not `Done`
contract.liveProof: PR URL, PR diff path list, staged path list, and CI status
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: writes `/tmp/chromux-prd-ship*.json` and `/tmp/chromux-pr-diff.txt`; no secrets in PR body or logs
